history.content:
<thought>
The cell directly in front of me is a lava cell, so moving forward is unsafe. The safest immediate move is to rotate and look for an alternate path around the lava corridor.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing a wall directly ahead, so I cannot move forward. The left side of my view has a clear floor cell adjacent to me, so I should rotate counter-clockwise to reorient toward a possible safe path.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly ahead is a safe floor cell, while the wall blocks the left side. Moving forward is the best safe progress from the current orientation.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>
